name: codex-trace-miner
description: Trace Miner packages skills, hooks, docs, and evals for turning public agent trace patterns into safer Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Mine trace patterns into safer Codex workflows
interface.longDescription: Trace Miner helps Codex extract reusable operating patterns from public trace datasets and related open-source projects without copying leaked prompts or raw chain-of-thought. It bundles concise workflow skills, conservative hooks, read-only context MCP tools, and before/after evals.
defaultPrompt: Use Trace Miner to plan this risky implementation.
Use Trace Miner to build a requirements ledger.
Use Trace Miner to run a finalguard review.
